title: Project Theseus Whitepaper
notes: Local-first report-driven RMI implementation reference: SymLiquid, SparkStream, Octopus Router, residual escrow, self-evolution gates, Hive runtime, observability.

title: Theseus Plan Compiler
notes: Goal-to-contract compiler with semantic IR DAGs, VCM context slices, executor routes, claim/evidence targets, contract hashes, and replay traces.

title: Theseus Self-Evolution System
notes: Evidence-first self-evolution lane with intervention ladder, ATTD repo-health gate, guarded teacher self-edit, architecture experiment governance, loop closure, and outcome ledger.

title: Theseus Architecture Gate
notes: Pre-training readiness gate covering ratchet completeness, router readiness, safety ledger, residual escrow, bridge benchmarks, procedural tools, routing memory, lifecycle governance, and external-inference zero.

title: Hive Operator OS and Work Board
notes: Shared command vocabulary, durable SQLite work board, node registry, background/watch/wake contracts, skill registry, tool hooks, feedback routing, and safety-visible operator surface.

title: Theseus Circle Calculus Transfer Lane
notes: Report-only bridge from Circle finite fixtures into private Theseus benchmark design with explicit quality/runtime/memory/transfer/failure-case claim boundaries.

title: Circle Calculus
notes: Proof-carrying finite cyclic mathematics project with Lean proofs, Python reference models, Rust utilities, theorem manifests, papers, and Quarto living book.

title: Circle Calculus AI Contract Suite
notes: Theorem-linked AI contract families for RoPE, KV-cache freshness, sparse attention, recurrence schedules, strided fanout, cyclic memory, multicoil phase, cyclic mixers, and seed-rule regeneration.

title: Circle AI Architectures
notes: Disciplined Circle AI thesis: use phase, recurrence, rotation, sparse cyclic mixing, circular memory, harmonic transforms, or geometry-aware structure only where the structure is real and baselines support it.

title: Coil Attention and Memory
notes: Proof-linked cyclic memory, KV-cache freshness, sparse-attention coverage, recurrence schedules, loop-exit certificates, work budgets, and alias diagnostics.

title: CoilRA and MultiCoil RoPE
notes: Adapter-block, residue/winding, block-cyclic, multicoil, relative RoPE, circulant convolution, cyclic mixer, and parameter-accounting substrate with explicit non-claims.

title: Proof-Carrying RoPE Position Distinguishability
notes: Externally usable RoPE position-distinguishability certifier with theorem-linked exact collision reports, bounded real-phase frontier, machine-readable receipts, and explicit non-claims.

title: Proof-Carrying Circular Computation
notes: CoilIR-style path from circle/coil expressions to dictionary-recognized cyclic structure, Lean-proved rewrite/address transformations, backend selection, and benchmark validation.

title: Fast Inference from Transformers via Speculative Decoding
notes: Primary external paper for speculative decoding: a draft model proposes multiple tokens and a target model verifies them, giving an exact-distribution acceleration path under its assumptions.
citation_label: Leviathan et al. (2022), Fast Inference from Transformers via Speculative Decoding

title: Better & Faster Large Language Models via Multi-token Prediction
notes: Primary external paper for multi-token prediction as an auxiliary training objective and inference-time multi-token proposal mechanism.
citation_label: Gloeckle et al. (2024), Better & Faster Large Language Models via Multi-token Prediction

title: Medusa: Simple LLM Inference Acceleration Framework with Multiple Decoding Heads
notes: Primary external paper for adding multiple decoding heads to an LLM and verifying tree-structured candidate continuations in parallel.

title: EAGLE: Speculative Sampling Requires Rethinking Feature Uncertainty
notes: Primary external paper for feature-level speculative drafting and target-model verification as an acceleration mechanism.

title: Break the Sequential Dependency of LLM Inference Using Lookahead Decoding
notes: Primary external paper for lookahead decoding: a parallel exact decoding algorithm that reduces serial decoding steps without an auxiliary draft model.

title: LayerSkip: Enabling Early Exit Inference and Self-Speculative Decoding
notes: Primary external paper for early-exit inference and self-speculative decoding where early layers draft and later layers verify.

title: Efficient Memory Management for Large Language Model Serving with PagedAttention
notes: Primary external paper for vLLM/PagedAttention, which treats KV-cache memory management and serving throughput as a distinct acceleration axis.
citation_label: Kwon et al. (2023), Efficient Memory Management for LLM Serving with PagedAttention

title: Mamba: Linear-Time Sequence Modeling with Selective State Spaces
notes: Primary external paper for selective state-space sequence models as a different long-sequence substrate and inference-efficiency axis from decoding tricks.

title: Large Language Diffusion Models
notes: Primary external paper for LLaDA, a large masked-diffusion language model trained with pretraining and supervised fine-tuning rather than left-to-right autoregression.
citation_label: Nie et al. (2025), Large Language Diffusion Models

title: Scaling Beyond Masked Diffusion Language Models
notes: Primary external paper for comparing diffusion language-model families by speed-quality tradeoffs rather than perplexity alone.
citation_label: Sahoo et al. (2026), Scaling Beyond Masked Diffusion Language Models

title: Trust Region Policy Optimization
notes: Primary external source for trust-region policy-gradient updates and bounded update-size discipline.
citation_label: Schulman et al. (2015), Trust Region Policy Optimization

title: Proximal Policy Optimization Algorithms
notes: Primary external source for PPO-style online policy-gradient updates and proximal surrogate objectives.
citation_label: Schulman et al. (2017), Proximal Policy Optimization Algorithms

title: ReMax: A Simple, Effective, and Efficient Reinforcement Learning Method for Aligning Large Language Models
notes: Primary external source for simpler RLHF-oriented policy-gradient updates relative to PPO-style machinery.

title: Direct Preference Optimization: Your Language Model is Secretly a Reward Model
notes: Primary external source for DPO-style offline preference optimization without a separate online RL loop.
citation_label: Rafailov et al. (2023), Direct Preference Optimization

title: A General Theoretical Paradigm to Understand Learning from Human Preferences
notes: External source for theoretical comparison of preference-learning objectives, including IPO/DPO-style framing.
citation_label: Azar et al. (2023), Learning from Human Preferences paradigm

title: ORPO: Monolithic Preference Optimization without Reference Model
notes: External source for reference-model-free monolithic preference optimization.

title: KTO: Model Alignment as Prospect Theoretic Optimization
notes: External source for prospect-theoretic model alignment and human-aware loss framing.

title: SimPO: Simple Preference Optimization with a Reference-Free Reward
notes: External source for simple reference-free preference optimization using sequence-level reward framing.

title: Back to Basics: Revisiting REINFORCE Style Optimization for Learning from Human Feedback in LLMs
notes: External source for revisiting simpler REINFORCE-style optimization as an RLHF baseline.
citation_label: Ahmadian et al. (2024), REINFORCE-style RLHF revisiting

title: DeepSeek-R1: Incentivizing Reasoning Capability in LLMs via Reinforcement Learning
notes: External source for reinforcement-learning pressure on reasoning behavior in large language models.

title: DAPO: An Open-Source LLM Reinforcement Learning System at Scale
notes: External source for open-source large-scale LLM RL system details and DAPO-style update design.

title: Group Sequence Policy Optimization
notes: External source for sequence-level group policy optimization in LLM reinforcement learning.
citation_label: Zheng et al. (2025), Group Sequence Policy Optimization

title: S-GRPO: Early Exit via Reinforcement Learning in Reasoning Models
notes: External source for early-exit reinforcement learning and overthinking control in reasoning models.

title: LongRLVR: Long-Context Reinforcement Learning Requires Verifiable Context Rewards
notes: External source for long-context RLVR and verifiable context-grounding rewards.

title: Open Problems and Fundamental Limitations of Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback
notes: External survey source for RLHF limitations, reward hacking, evaluator limits, and complementary safeguards.
citation_label: Casper et al. (2023), Open Problems and Fundamental Limitations of RLHF
